rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Educ. Code §10.002 governs development of an early childhood integrated data system. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and share no operative overlap.
quote: Subject to Section 10.003(1), the early childhood interagency work group shall initiate the development of the early childhood integrated data system
_note: No conflict; rule_text pertains to early childhood data systems, not property tax exemptions.
